category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the reference implementation of the Linux FUSE interface; official libfuse API docs describe FUSE as userspace filesystems for the Linux kernel.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are libfuse; official API documentation title is libfuse.
docs_sources: Official libfuse GitHub Pages site is API documentation; the docs page links the libfuse wiki for kernel-userspace protocol documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/libfuse/libfuse, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify FUSE filesystem and mount/fusermount tools; official API docs describe mounting, unmounting, reading requests, and sending responses.
